name: shotgun-cli
description: A powerful CLI tool for generating optimized prompts for AI interactions
author: Your Name <your.email@example.com>

scripts.build:platform: node -e "const os = require('os'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); if (os.platform() === 'win32') { execSync('npm run build:windows', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { execSync('npm run build:unix', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.build:cross-platform: echo "Cross-platform build specific logic if needed. For now, use build:windows or build:unix separately." && exit 1
scripts.build:windows: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('bin')) fs.mkdirSync('bin', {recursive: true});" && go build -ldflags='-s -w' -o bin/shotgun.exe main.go && node create-wrapper.js
scripts.build:unix: mkdir -p bin && go build -ldflags='-s -w' -o bin/shotgun main.go && node create-wrapper.js
scripts.clean:windows: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const binDir = path.join('bin'); if (fs.existsSync(binDir)) { fs.readdirSync(binDir).forEach(f => fs.unlinkSync(path.join(binDir, f))); fs.rmdirSync(binDir); }"
scripts.clean:cross-platform: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('bin')) fs.rmSync('bin', {recursive: true, force: true});"
